sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content: Ready to book your stay? Have a question? We are here to help. Reach out to us via phone, WhatsApp, or email, and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
sections.meta_description: Contact Latitude Zero Cottages Kikorongo for bookings, inquiries, and information. Reach us via WhatsApp, phone, or email.

sections.title: Book Your Stay
sections.content: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you with availability and pricing. You can also reach out directly via WhatsApp for quick responses.
